skyline.team_desc: Dedicated team of architects and engineers delivering excellence across Erode and surroundings.

services.s1_desc: Commercial & Residential building construction with modern architecture and durability.
services.s1_long_desc: We specialize in end-to-end construction services for both residential and commercial projects. From foundation to the final coat of paint, our team ensures every detail meets international standards of safety and aesthetics. We use premium materials and state-of-the-art construction techniques to bring your vision to life.
services.s1_analysis: High-tensile steel and M25 grade concrete for 50+ years of structural integrity. Energy-efficient building envelopes.
services.s2_desc: Transform your space into a modern sanctuary with expert design and structural refinement.
services.s2_long_desc: Our renovation services breathe new life into existing structures. We specialize in structural modifications, layout optimization, and modernizing old buildings while maintaining their soul. Whether it's a home makeover or a commercial space revamp, we deliver excellence.
services.s2_analysis: Precision space mapping and ergonomic layouts. Seamless integration of smart lighting and premium finishes.
services.s3_desc: Bespoke modular kitchens and wardrobes designed for elegance and maximum utility.
services.s3_long_desc: Experience the future of interior design with our modular solutions. We provide high-quality, factory-finished modular kitchens and wardrobes that are easy to install and maintain. Our designs focus on maximizing storage space without compromising on style.
services.s3_analysis: Termite-proof HDMR boards with Italian hardware. Soft-close technology and moisture-resistant coatings.
services.s4_desc: Heavy-duty steel shed fabrication and premium roofing solutions for industrial and residential use.
services.s4_long_desc: We provide robust industrial fabrication services, specializing in heavy-duty steel sheds and UPVC roofing systems. Our solutions are designed to withstand harsh weather conditions while providing excellent thermal insulation and structural stability for factories and warehouses.
services.s4_analysis: Corrosion-resistant Galvalume sheets with 0.50mm - 0.70mm thickness. Reinforced truss systems.

spoken.team_desc: Expert in behavioral training and spoken language pedagogy, making learning Hindi effortless for Tamil speakers.
spoken.whatsapp_msg: Hi Surendar J, I am interested in your spoken Hindi classes.

services.s1_desc: Interactive spoken sessions designed to make you fluent step-by-step.
services.s1_analysis: 80% Speaking, 20% Grammar. Focuses on daily-use vocabulary and pronunciation correction.
services.s2_desc: Professional language training for seamless business operations in North India.
services.s2_analysis: Formal greetings, email etiquette, negotiation vocabulary, and industry-specific terminologies.
services.s3_desc: Learn with peers in a vibrant, highly engaging virtual or physical classroom.
services.s3_analysis: Group discussions, peer-to-peer practice, and gamified learning activities to boost confidence.
services.s4_desc: Structured courses ensuring measurable progress and recognized proficiency.
services.s4_analysis: Covering reading, listening, and speaking. Certificate awarded upon completion of final assessment.

woodzone.team_desc: Transforming living spaces with master-crafted tiles and fine wooden furniture selection since 2012.

services.s1_desc: Elegant and durable flooring solutions for residential and commercial spaces.
services.s1_analysis: Ceramic, Porcelain, Vitrified, and Natural Stone. Slip-resistant and high-gloss variants available.
services.s2_desc: Bespoke hand-crafted and machine-finished furniture matching your interior.
services.s2_analysis: Teak, Rosewood, Engineered wood. Includes dining sets, sofas, beds, and decorative stands.
services.s3_desc: Stylish backsplash, bathroom, and exterior elevation tiles.
services.s3_analysis: 3D textures, mosaic, subway tiles, and moisture-resistant bathroom ceramics.
services.s4_desc: Ready-to-assemble wooden wardrobes, cabinets, and TV units.
services.s4_analysis: Matte, high-gloss laminates, and acrylics with soft-close hinges and smart storage.
services.s5_desc: Premium hardwood and engineered wood flooring for elegant spaces.
services.s5_analysis: Durable, water-resistant, and aesthetically pleasing timber flooring.
services.s6_desc: Intricate wooden carvings, sculptures, and traditional art pieces.
services.s6_analysis: Custom hand-carved pillars, doors, and decorative wooden panels.

thiran.team_desc: Innovative IT solutions provider in Gobichettipalayam, specializing in custom software and app development since 2023.

services.s1_desc: High-performance iOS and Android applications built with modern frameworks for seamless user experience.
services.s1_analysis: Cross-platform development using React Native/Flutter. RESTful API integration and secure cloud sync.
services.s2_desc: Responsive and SEO-optimized websites ranging from corporate landing pages to complex e-commerce platforms.
services.s2_analysis: Next.js/React frontend with robust backend architectures. Optimized for Core Web Vitals.
services.s3_desc: Customized ERP, CRM, and automation software designed to streamline your business operations.
services.s3_analysis: Scalable microservices architecture. Secure data encryption and real-time analytics dashboards.
services.s4_desc: Expert guidance on digital transformation, cloud infrastructure, and AI integration for future-ready businesses.
services.s4_analysis: Comprehensive tech audits and strategic roadmap planning. Optimizing cost and performance.
services.s5_desc: User-centric design focusing on intuitive interfaces and delightful user journeys for apps and websites.
services.s5_analysis: High-fidelity prototyping and user persona mapping. Following modern design systems like Material/HIG.
services.s6_desc: Secure and scalable cloud migration and management services using AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.
services.s6_analysis: Serverless architectures and automated scaling. Ensuring 99.9% uptime and robust disaster recovery.

swaraj.team_desc: Saaral Motors is your trusted partner for high-performance Swaraj tractors and professional maintenance services.
swaraj.cta_heading: Ready to power up your farm?

services.s1_desc: Wide range of Swaraj models including 735FE, 744XT, 855FE, 963FE and more.
services.s1_analysis: HP Target 630 to 969FE. Options for 2WD and 4WD. High torque and fuel efficiency.
services.s2_desc: Expert maintenance and repair services by certified technicians.
services.s2_analysis: Advanced diagnostic tools and genuine spares. Regular maintenance for long engine life.
services.s3_desc: 100% authentic Swaraj spare parts for maximum durability and performance.
services.s3_analysis: Ready stock for all FE and XT models. Quality guaranteed for heavy-duty usage.
services.s4_desc: Easy financing options and comprehensive insurance for your new tractor.
services.s4_analysis: Low interest rates and flexible tenure. Instant documentation and hassle-free processing.

sunpower.team_desc: Founder & Owner Jc S.R.S. Prabakaran has been delivering trusted water purification, UPS/battery solutions, and solar systems in Kavindapadi since 2002.
sunpower.whatsapp_msg: Hi Jc S.R.S. Prabakaran, I am interested in your Mega Sun Power Equipments services.

water_ro.title: R.O Water Purifier Sales & Services
water_ro.desc: Premium domestic and industrial R.O water purifiers ensuring safe, clean, and healthy drinking water.
water_ro.s1_desc: Top-tier household R.O water systems with multi-stage filtration (RO+UV+UF+TDS control).
water_ro.s1_analysis: Removes 99% impurities, retains essential minerals, and has low water wastage.
water_ro.s2_desc: High capacity water purification systems designed for offices, schools, and commercial establishments.
water_ro.s2_analysis: Custom scale design, fully automatic operations, and robust stainless-steel build.
water_ro.s3_desc: Timely filter replacements, membrane cleaning, and emergency repair services for all brands.
water_ro.s3_analysis: Prompt service, original spare parts, and annual maintenance contracts (AMC) available.

power_solar.title: Solar, UPS & Battery Solutions
power_solar.desc: Sustainable solar systems and reliable UPS/battery backup configurations to keep you powered 24/7.
power_solar.s1_desc: Eco-friendly solar powered water pumping systems for agricultural and domestic irrigation.
power_solar.s1_analysis: High efficiency solar controllers, zero fuel cost, low maintenance, and weather resistant.
power_solar.s2_desc: All-in-one solar street lighting systems with automatic dusk-to-dawn sensors and bright LED lamps.
power_solar.s2_analysis: LiFePO4 battery inside, high conversion solar panels, smart motion detectors.
power_solar.s3_desc: Complete solar grid integration to reduce electricity bills or provide complete energy independence.
power_solar.s3_analysis: Net metering assistance, premium solar panels, intelligent hybrid inverters.
power_solar.s4_desc: Heavy-duty home and commercial UPS systems paired with high performance batteries for seamless power.
power_solar.s4_analysis: Pure sine wave delivery, long-lasting tubular batteries, short circuit protection.

manojsteels.location: 201, Sathy aathani main road, t.n. palayam, Gobichettipalayam
manojsteels.team_desc: Founder & Owner ManojKumar anandhan has been supplying premium building materials, certified TMT bars, quality cement, and building blocks in Gobichettipalayam since 2012.
manojsteels.whatsapp_msg: Hi ManojKumar anandhan, I am interested in Manojsteels building materials.

cement_steel.title: Cement & TMT Steel Supply
cement_steel.desc: IS-certified reinforcement TMT steel bars and high-grade cement for solid foundations.
cement_steel.s1_desc: Authorized dealer of high-strength grade (53 & 43) cement brands for concrete and plastering.
cement_steel.s1_analysis: Excellent binding properties, rapid setting, resistance to cracks and sulfate attack.
cement_steel.s2_desc: Fe 550D / Fe 600 grade corrosion-resistant steel bars for high structural seismic durability.
cement_steel.s2_analysis: High tensile strength, superb bendability, rust protection, and certified quality.
cement_steel.s3_desc: On-time site delivery with our dedicated logistics fleet ensuring uninterrupted construction work.
cement_steel.s3_analysis: Same-day delivery option, safe offloading, and transparent quantity verification.

aggregates_blocks.title: Blue Metal & Building Blocks
aggregates_blocks.desc: High durability concrete solid blocks and premium aggregates for all structural construction.
aggregates_blocks.s1_desc: Quality blue metal gravel in various sizes (6mm, 12mm, 20mm, 40mm) and premium baby chips.
aggregates_blocks.s1_analysis: Crushed granite stone, uniform grading, free from dust, ideal for structural concrete.
aggregates_blocks.s2_desc: High density solid concrete blocks and light-weight hollow blocks with exceptional load-bearing capacity.
aggregates_blocks.s2_analysis: Precise dimensions, high compressive strength, thermal insulation, and low water absorption.
aggregates_blocks.s3_desc: Quality manufactured sand for concrete and plastering as a durable alternative to river sand.
aggregates_blocks.s3_analysis: Zero silt content, uniform grain size, and superior workability for high strength plaster.

mejestic.location: Loc 2, MIN NAGAR, AMALA SCHOOL ROAD, GOBI 638452
mejestic.team_desc: Founder & Lead Photographer K. Arun has been delivering creative portrait captures, wedding coverage, event portfolios, and studio lighting magic in Gobichettipalayam since 2012.
mejestic.whatsapp_msg: Hi K. Arun, I am interested in Mejestic Studio's photography services.

studio_portraits.title: Studio & Portrait Photography
studio_portraits.desc: Ultra high-resolution indoor portraits, modeling portfolios, baby shoots, and passport services.
studio_portraits.s1_desc: High-fidelity professional portrait sessions with customized backdrops and beauty lighting.
studio_portraits.s1_analysis: Shot on full-frame cameras, pro softbox diffusers, professional retouching included.
studio_portraits.s2_desc: Comfortable studio shoots for newborns, toddlers, and family reunions with creative prop setups.
studio_portraits.s2_analysis: Safe environment, child-friendly staff, colorful themed backgrounds.
studio_portraits.s3_desc: Instant passport, visa, and corporate ID photos conforming to global official specifications.
studio_portraits.s3_analysis: Biometric alignment check, matte/glossy prints, instant digital copy delivery.

events_weddings.title: Weddings & Outdoor Shoots
events_weddings.desc: Cinematic wedding stories, candid couples photoshoots, and outdoor fashion coverage.
events_weddings.s1_desc: Artistic capturing of precious raw emotions, rituals, and guest joy during your special day.
events_weddings.s1_analysis: Dual-photographer coverage, prime portrait lenses, custom-graded digital albums.
events_weddings.s2_desc: Premium 4K video recording, drone aerial coverage, and emotional highlight reels/teasers.
events_weddings.s2_analysis: 4K gimbal stabilization, professional sound recording, drone site permit included.
events_weddings.s3_desc: Scenic outdoor pre-wedding or post-wedding photoshoots at picturesque locations.
events_weddings.s3_analysis: Location scouting, guidance on styling/poses, high-end color-grading.

sakthi.team_desc: High-quality, reliable servicing of home electrical and electronics appliances under the blessings of Arulmigu Sri Ponkaliyamman.
sakthi.whatsapp_msg: Hi Sri Sakthi Electricals, I would like to book a service for my household appliances.
sakthi.all_services_available: âš¡ All Home Electrical & Electronics Services Available ðŸ› ï¸

services.s1_desc: Complete mechanical overhaul, stone alignment, and high-performance motor winding.
services.s1_analysis: Diagnostic tests for speed stability, belt tensioning, and stone wear. Heavy-duty 100% copper windings.
services.s2_desc: Coil rewinding, capacitor testing, and noise reduction for ceiling, table, and pedestal fans.
services.s2_analysis: Precision copper coil rewinding with high-grade insulation. Dynamic balance testing for vibration-free rotation.
services.s3_desc: Starter relay diagnostics, calibration, contact replacement, and overload protection setup.
services.s3_analysis: Testing of contact resistance, magnetic coil current draw, and automated trip-switch operations.
services.s4_desc: IGBT replacement, motherboard troubleshooting, coil heating calibration, and touch panel fix.
services.s4_analysis: Microprocessor temperature control calibration. Wattage output monitoring and electrical leakage checks.
services.s5_desc: Amplifier repair, audio channel troubleshooting, surround sound tuning, and hardware optimization.
services.s5_analysis: Frequency response calibration, dual-channel audio isolation, and high-fidelity output distortion tests.
services.s6_desc: Motor carbon brush replacement, coupler repairs, jar blade sharpening, and speed control fixes.
services.s6_analysis: High-RPM load profiling. Speed regulator contact checks and jar leakage seal replacement.
services.s7_desc: Thermostat testing, heating coil replacement, and inner tank descaling for optimal heating.
services.s7_analysis: Continuity checks on thermal cut-out switches and earth leakage detection.
services.s8_desc: Complete residential wiring, distribution board setup, and short-circuit fault isolation.
services.s8_analysis: Load balancing across phases and insulation resistance testing using megger.
services.s9_desc: Motor rewinding, bearing replacement, and water seal fitting for domestic and agricultural pumps.
services.s9_analysis: Stator coil resistance testing, rotor dynamic balancing, and submersible cable joints check.
services.s10_desc: PCB diagnostics, motor belt replacement, drum cleaning, and water inlet valve repairs.
services.s10_analysis: Error code diagnostics, spin cycle unbalance detection, and pressure switch calibration.
services.s11_desc: Backlight replacement, motherboard servicing, screen issues troubleshooting, and power supply fixes.
services.s11_analysis: T-CON board voltage checks, LED strip series current testing, and firmware flashing.
services.s12_desc: Magnetron replacement, high voltage transformer diagnostics, and touch panel keypad repair.
services.s12_analysis: High-voltage capacitor discharge tests and microwave radiation leakage checks.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Please read and accept to continue
terms.section1_text: Welcome to Gobi 360. By using our application, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions of use.
terms.section2_text: You agree to use this service only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of, restrict or inhibit anyone else's use and enjoyment of the service.
terms.section3_text: Your privacy is important to us. Our Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use our service.
terms.section4_text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password and for restricting access to your device.
terms.section5_text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Your continued use of the app after such changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.declined_msg: You must accept the terms and conditions to use the application.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.data_protection_text: We use industry-standard encryption to protect your data both in transit and at rest.
privacy.account_security_text: Your account is protected by your mobile number and password uniquely.
privacy.permissions_text: We only request permissions that are essential for the app functions like location or camera.
privacy.third_party_text: We do not sell your personal data to any third-party marketing companies.
privacy.details_contact: For more details, contact our support team at {{email}}

about.title: About Gobi 360
about.description: Gobi 360 is your one-stop solution for all professional home services. We connect you with verified experts for plumbing, electrical, cleaning, and more.

help.title: Help & Support
help.q1: How do I book a service?
help.a1: Go to the Dashboard, select a category, pick an expert, and click 'Book Now'.
help.a2: We currently support cash on service and major UPI payments.
help.q3: How can I become a partner?
help.a3: Please contact us via email with your profile and we'll get back to you.

bot.welcome: Hello! I'm your OneTouch Guide. What service do you want today?
bot.ask_service: What type of service are you looking for? (e.g., CCTV, Painting, Carpentry)
bot.contact_guide: You can find specialists in the 'Experts' tab or directly within a service portfolio. Feel free to use the call or WhatsApp buttons!
bot.how_it_works: Choose a service, browse portfolios, and contact experts directly via call or WhatsApp. It's that simple!
bot.find_specialist: I've found the right specialist for that! Would you like to view their portfolio?
bot.found_specialist: I've found the right specialist for that! Would you like to view {{name}}'s portfolio?
bot.match_multiple: I found {{count}} specialists for that. Which one would you like to see?
bot.not_sure: That request is not clear to me. Please search for 'CCTV', 'Painting', or 'Carpentry'.
